gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Kierkegaard the 2nd found a live document_kv_cache fallback to stale restaurant_kv_serving modules and insufficient exact public-surface coverage. The branch removed the fallback, made runtime exports match the typed Cachet facade, added a fake-stale-legacy regression test, pinned public exports/submodules/scripts exactly, reran verification, and the same reviewer approved PR #440 with no remaining findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q --maxfail=10 --tb=short -> 64 passed
built cachet_kv-0.2.0-py3-none-any.whl in /tmp/cachet-wheel-check and inspected: legacy_entries=[] and legacy_script_files=[]
changed-file high-signal secret-pattern scan -> no findings
GPT-5.5 reviewer Kierkegaard the 2nd found two issues: live legacy fallback and weakened public-surface tests; both were fixed and re-review approved with no findings
what_changed: Removed the source-only src/restaurant_kv_serving compatibility facade after current downstream migration evidence proved runners no longer depend on it.
Removed stale runtime fallback from document_kv_cache so a stray external restaurant_kv_serving package cannot change Cachet/document root exports.

Pinned public package exports, typed Cachet root exports, public submodules, and console scripts with exact tests while keeping release-bundle guards against legacy wheel files and restaurant-kv scripts.
why: Finish the one-repo Cachet package consolidation by making Cachet/document_kv_cache the only supported source package surfaces and preventing old restaurant import paths from silently re-entering source, wheels, or CLI metadata.
